events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: phase tape colors wrong on wire pulling (feeders & branch) at rough-complete stage. NEC 200.6 deals with identification of grounded conductors, 210.5 deals with identification of branch circuit conductors. Wrong phase tape colors = non-compliant identification. This is a fail.
